personal.preferred_title: Senior Capacity Planning & Performance Analytics Engineer

summary: Capacity and performance-focused data/platform engineer with 20+ years of enterprise experience turning telemetry and workflow data into actionable forecasting models, staffing signals, and cost-aware planning decisions. Strong track record in Python/SQL analytics, reliability-driven data pipelines, and cross-functional planning with operations and finance stakeholders. Hands-on builder who translates complex queue and throughput behavior into clear decisions for leadership.

experience.title: Senior Data Engineer / Capacity Engineering Lead
bullets: Built enterprise capacity forecasting pipelines from operational telemetry to support proactive scaling and demand planning.
Developed Python/SQL workflows to model throughput, utilization trends, and threshold risks for infrastructure and operations leaders.
Partnered with engineering and business stakeholders to connect technical demand signals with budget and planning decisions.
Implemented monitoring and data quality controls to improve forecast trust and reduce operational surprises.
Drove process improvements that reduced manual analysis and improved planning cycle speed for recurring capacity reviews.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon/Synthetics and produced actionable performance insights for high-traffic customer systems.
Analyzed real-user metrics and bottlenecks to guide engineering priorities and improve service quality.
Built reporting dashboards with before/after KPI views for executive and operational stakeholders.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Led large-scale observability and performance implementations across regulated enterprise environments.
Built data extraction and reporting scripts to improve visibility into capacity and stability risks.
Advised client teams on sizing, bottleneck diagnostics, and operational readiness.

experience.title: Performance Test Engineer
bullets: Analyzed load and break points in telecom applications using CPU, memory, thread, and database indicators.
Automated data collection and test diagnostics to accelerate issue isolation and performance tuning.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led large-scale migration of data systems to improve throughput and reduce infrastructure footprint.
Built validation automation to maintain data integrity during high-volume cutovers.

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built a Python/PySpark forecasting pipeline using ML models to project capacity bottlenecks and improve planning lead time.

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built an end-to-end automation pipeline with duplicate detection, scoring, artifact generation, and application tracking.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering
